visual_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on two men sitting side-by-side in what appears to be an office. The man on the left, in sharp focus, is wearing a white, short-sleeved uniform shirt with epaulets, a black tie, and glasses. He has a serious, questioning expression as he looks slightly off-camera. The man to his right is slightly out of focus, wearing a light blue button-down shirt and a lanyard with an ID badge. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The background is a dimly lit, modern office space. A man speaks in a serious and questioning tone, his voice low and steady. He asks, "Do you know what Superintendent Wong went there for?" The camera cuts to a medium shot of a man standing in a doorway. He is dressed in a white shirt, a loosened black tie, and dark trousers. He has his hands on his hips and a stern, unyielding look on his face. He is looking towards the two men from the previous shot, who are now out of focus in the foreground. The setting is the same office environment, with glass partitions and other people visible in the blurred background. The white Chinese characters remain
